Localization.Description: A connection is allowed or denied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is denied by Anti-spoofing on host {event_src.host}
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is allowed on host {event_src.host}
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is denied on host {event_src.host}
